title: Arda's Cobblestone Generator
description: This mod adds a cobblestone generator to the game that produces cobblestone.
body:
![la](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77f0d05c4bc52b9c668046892b5fa4c54513e427.png)
![gen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f763c0d619a01509704049940e3974e7b56f03df.png)
![..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f66d03f9630cf11aa0497b4e631f49bc8ac56808.png)

### **Mod**
Say goodbye to tedious mining! This mod adds a powerful, functional block called the Cobblestone Generator that fundamentally changes how you gather one of Minecraft's most critical building materials: cobblestone.

![..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f66d03f9630cf11aa0497b4e631f49bc8ac56808.png)

### **How**
![how](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b173f1a0d3d0154fb439e34f28f244968c068d7.png)
The Cobblestone Generator automates stone production by combining internal Lava and Water. It features three storage slots, each holding 256 blocks for a total capacity of 12 full stacks. Build more, mine less!

![..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f66d03f9630cf11aa0497b4e631f49bc8ac56808.png)

### **Auto**
![out](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49ca1562124aacfe386c630daf54ffef1b241cf0.png)

![..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f66d03f9630cf11aa0497b4e631f49bc8ac56808.png)

### **Version**
- 1.20.1 Forge

![..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f66d03f9630cf11aa0497b4e631f49bc8ac56808.png)
